note: Append-only log of what Ahmad's broker shares each run. INFORMATION SOURCE ONLY — zero decision weight on its own. Captured verbatim in 'raw', verified independently in Step 1, graded as type=broker_call predictions in Step 7. Fields per row: date (YYYY-MM-DD), source (broker), raw (verbatim text), symbol, claim_type (tip|prediction|news|target|rumor), direction (buy|sell|hold|n/a), price_level, captured_status (unverified|verified|refuted), prediction_id (the broker_call P-id once logged), notes. Never edit or delete past rows.

raw: Syed Faraz Equities WEEKLY SPI UPDATE (Fri Jun 19 2026): Sensitive Price Indicator combined 357.76 (18-Jun) vs 356.11 (11-Jun) = +0.46% WoW; YoY +15.28% (combined 310.35 on 19-Jun-25). Quintiles WoW: Q1 +0.64%, Q2 +0.61%, Q3 +0.53%, Q4 +0.51%, Q5 +0.39%. Headline: 'Weekly SPI increased by 0.46%'. Source: PBS / SFEL Research.
notes: Macro inflation print, NOT a stock tip — zero decision weight. E-lens context only: SPI +0.46% WoW, YoY ~15.28% confirms inflation sticky mid-teens, consistent with SBP hold at 11.5% (supports R-001 bank-NIM regime; argues against near-term cuts). No single-name buy/sell/target. Cross-check vs official PBS SPI if used. Not graded as broker_call (no directional claim).
